title: crataegus orientalis
intro: Crataegus orientalis, also known as the Oriental hawthorn or Korean hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rosaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of Crataegus orientalis include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antidiabetic agent. The herbal preparations of Crataegus orientalis include teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of hypertension, anxiety, and insomnia.
